company_summary: Typeface is a generative AI content platform built for enterprises, enabling teams to create on-brand content at scale using AI. Founded by Abhay Parasnis (ex-Adobe CTO) in 2022, the company raised $165M+ at a $1B+ valuation and targets marketing and creative teams at large organizations. Their core product focuses on brand personalization, multi-modal content generation, and AI-native workflows integrated into enterprise tools.
fit_indicators: Typeface builds enterprise AI products — Sudheer has 4 years delivering production systems inside a large enterprise (RNTBCI/Nissan-Renault-Mitsubishi), giving him direct empathy for enterprise user pain points and org complexity

Typeface is an AI-native company building with LLMs — Sudheer is actively building multi-agent AI systems with Claude API, directly matching the technical fluency a PM intern needs to work credibly with engineers on AI features

Role likely involves internal tooling and workflow automation signals — Sudheer built billing, attendance, and design approval internal tools at RNTBCI used daily across a multi-brand automotive org, demonstrating PM-adjacent product ownership

Typeface targets marketing and creative workflows requiring cross-functional coordination — Sudheer's Carlson MBA positions him to bridge technical and business stakeholder communication, a core PM intern competency

Typeface was founded by Adobe's ex-CTO and serves enterprise content teams — Sudheer's background in legacy modernisation and microservices at scale signals ability to understand both the technical debt and transformation journey enterprise customers face

contact_targets.title: Senior Product Manager or Group PM
contact_targets.reason: Direct manager or collaborator for PM interns — best person to validate fit, discuss roadmap priorities, and advocate for intern candidates internally

contact_targets.title: Software Engineer or AI Engineer (mid-senior)
contact_targets.reason: Peers to PM interns on feature squads — Sudheer's Java/AI engineering background gives him natural credibility to connect with this group and learn the technical landscape before joining

contact_targets.title: MBA Recruiter or University Recruiting Lead
contact_targets.reason: Specifically sourcing MBA PM interns — useful for confirming internship timeline, application status, and Carlson MBA pipeline if direct PM contact is unavailable
